text_source: ...She really came with us.
Don't you worry, Yuuri! I'm here to protect you.
Ah... Th-Thank you...
But, um, it's hard to walk when you're...
Oh, don't worry about that, silly.\n
I'm just supporting you!
No, I mean...
Man, what am I gonna do? Atuy still doesn't\n
know about Yuuri's lover, let alone her gender.
To make matters worse, I thought she was just\n
forming a little crush, but she's head over\n
heels.
It... kinda feels too late to just tell her\n
the truth and hope for the best.
Yeah, all right. I haven't heard anything,\n
haven't seen anything. Nope. Nothing going on\n
at all.
Urgh... This smell is... rough.
We happen to be in a sewer, so yes. It is.
Be that as it may, you don't have to be so\n
blunt about it...
It cannot be helped. Egress via the sewer\n
tunnels is the best method of escaping\n
detection.
Take comfort in the fact that we will not be\n
traversing the sewer canal proper, if nothing\n
else.
...If I recall... The canal below us is\n
expressly for waste.
Yeah, this is probably better than trudging\n
through that by a mile.
Hey, Yuuri, are you hungry? I made bento, so\n
we can eat together, if you like.
Huh? N-No, thank you, that's...
Whoa, there, take it down a notch or three.\n
A romantic bento lunch in the sewers is NOT\n
happening.
Watch your step, you two. You don't want\n
to trip down here.
O-OK--
Understood.
Um...
I understand why we're here, but maybe a little\n
warning next time...?
I'm sorry for putting you through all this\n
trouble.
Huh? Oh, no, I didn't mean it like that...
Sorry. If you really can't deal with it,\n
just tell me. I'm not forcing you to do\n
anything, here.
Huh?
N-No, not at all, really--
Really? If that's the case, then don't mind if\n
I do. I'm outta h--
*Swish*...
Kuon's tail slips efficiently around the crown\n
of my head.
*KRRKKKKK KRKK KRK--*
Ow ow OW OK IT WAS JUST A JOKE--
Dear sister, perhaps you SHOULD let him go\n
back, if he desires it so much.
If you throw him into the channel ahead, he\n
should be able to get out by riding the flow.
By way of the sewer canal, naturally.
You're right. Let's do that.
Now, hold on, that's not even funn--
I'm only kidding, but hopefully you've\n
learned your lesson.
We aren't throwing him in, then?
Huh!?
Sh-She's not joking...
Nekone is scary. Really scary.
*Squeak, squeak--*
Eep!?
Whoa, there--
Are you OK?
Y-Yes, thank you...
It's dangerous there. Walk on this side a\n
little more.
Eek, my foot slipped!
Ah!? Hey--
It's so scaaary down here. Is it OK if I get\n
closer to you?
It's like I'm watching a farce...
It should be this way. Oshtor's map says\n
we should take the next left, then...\n
We're getting close.
Thank God. We'll be free of this smell, at\n
least.
Phew...
Hey Yuuri, what are you gonna do when all this\n
is over?
After this? I'm leaving the capital behind.
Eh? Really?
Yes. The plan is to meet with another escort\n
outside the walls, then go on from there.
Oh, crap, she's looking this way.
Did I say something wrong?
Huh... That sounds, um... rough.
I know! Maybe together--
--we'll be able to make the handoff without\n
a hitch.
Sorry, Atuy, but I'm not gonna let you say it.
Geez, don't pop a vein making that face.\n
I said it for your sake!
I had my doubts, but she's really planning to\n
go with her...?
Naturally, I have calculated the most efficient\n
route to our goal while still considering\n
stealth.
Even if we are pursued, shaking off any tails\n
or shadows should be a matter of course.
...She says that all matter-of-factly, but\n
she's still puffing out her chest.
You really are great at devising these plans\n
for us, Nekone.
I-I... I am not so great as that.
You needn't be so modest! You really are\n
incredible, Neko. Give yourself some credit.
So, uh, what are we gonna do if there's an\n
ambush at the exit? All our sneaking won't\n
mean jack.
Say, for instance, if they came advancing out\n
of th--
Head
Head1
Ad... vancing...?
Way to jinx it, love.
Is it that fun bullying Nekone?
N-Now wait a second, how did you get THAT out\n
of what I said? Your logic doesn't make any\n
sense--
Ahem. I don't know who you are, but I take it\n
you have some business with us, gentlemen?
Man
Weeeell, seems we surprised you. Nah, we're\n
just lookin' for somebody.
Someone called... Yuuri. That ring any bells?
Ngh...
Nope, can't say it does.
Huh. Then I guess it can't be helped. Shame.
Why don't you keep us company for a little\n
while, huh?
Ruffian
Eh heh heh...
Lucky us. They're all lookers, every one of\n
'em.
Bastards...
Wh-Who are you people--
Weren't you busy looking for someone?
Oh, don't get me wrong, we got that to do.\n
But I ain't gonna look a sexy gift horse in\n
the mouth.
Heh heh. So many beauties in such an obscure\n
place... Can you blame a guy for takin' what\n
life gives?
Nekone, get behind me!
So... the group pursuing Yuuri finally showed\n
up, but they can't see through the disguise.
...But they're total lowlives, so we're gonna\n
get jumped anyway.
What's this hazy feeling...?
Whoa, now, don't you move. Resist if that's\n
your thing, but you don't wanna be damaged\n
goods, now, huh?
We'll show you a REAL good time if you play\n
along, heh...
Ngh--
Hey, now, didn't I just tell you not to move?
We can sell the men to the right buyers, too.\n
Don't go givin' us trouble, now.
We don't mind killin' one of you as a warning,\n
if we hafta.
How interesting... So there are men like this\n
even in the Mikado's own holy city.
The capital's become so dense that this kind\n
of thing happens right under the Mikado's nose...
Sir Haku...
Hm? Hey, it's gonna be all right.\n
You'll be safe. Promise.
Oh...
O-OK...
Yee hee. Awful confident, aren't you, big guy?\n
Showing off in front of your ladyfriend?
Just how are you gonna protect her, huh?
What do you mean "how"...?
Hah, all right. This one's mine--
